# zenfra_space (Data Source)

Reads a single Zenfra space by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "zenfra_space" "production" {
  id = "sp-abc123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the space.

### Read-Only

- `child_count` (Number) Number of child spaces.
- `created_at` (String) RFC3339 timestamp when the space was created.
- `created_by` (String) The user ID who created this space.
- `depth` (Number) The nesting depth of this space in the hierarchy.
- `description` (String) Description of the space.
- `inherit_bundles` (Boolean) Whether stacks in this space inherit bundles from parent spaces.
- `name` (String) The name of the space.
- `organization_id` (String) The organization ID that owns this space.
- `parent_id` (String) The parent space ID if this is a nested space.
- `slug` (String) The URL-friendly slug for the space.
- `stack_count` (Number) Number of stacks in this space.
- `updated_at` (String) RFC3339 timestamp when the space was last updated.
- `updated_by` (String) The user ID who last updated this space.
